task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Neonatal Risk Status' data element with the specified properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen in the DHIS2 Maintenance app showing the Data Element configuration with Name 'Neonatal Risk Status', Domain Type 'Tracker', Value Type 'Text', and Aggregation Type 'None'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Neonatal Risk Status' data element is added to the 'Birth' program stage of the 'Child Programme'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the 'Birth' program stage configuration (within the 'Child Programme'), with 'Neonatal Risk Status' visible in the list of assigned or selected data elements.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a program rule named 'Low Birth Weight Trigger'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the Program Rule details step with the Name set to 'Low Birth Weight Trigger' and the Program selected as 'Child Programme'.

task_completion.description: Verify the program rule expression/condition checks if the birth weight is less than 2500.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the Program Rule expression step containing a condition that evaluates if the 'Weight (g)' (or 'CP Birth Weight') is less than 2500 (e.g., an expression like `#{...} < 2500`).

task_completion.description: Verify the program rule action assigns 'High Risk' to the 'Neonatal Risk Status' data element.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the Program Rule Action configured with the action type 'Assign value', the target data element set to 'Neonatal Risk Status', and the expression/value to assign set to 'High Risk' (often enclosed in quotes).

integrity.description: The agent used the DHIS2 web interface to configure the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the DHIS2 web application UI (browser window, Maintenance app menus, forms) rather than terminal windows executing API curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent navigated through the actual application forms and menus.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate configuration screens (e.g., searching for data elements, filling out rule expressions) rather than just a final success message or a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine DHIS2 environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows valid DHIS2 paths (e.g., containing `/dhis-web-maintenance/`) and the UI elements match standard DHIS2 styling without signs of a mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring DHIS2. Look for: 1) A new Tracker data element named 'Neonatal Risk Status' (Value Type: Text, Aggregation: None). 2) This element added to the 'Birth' stage of the 'Child Programme'. 3) A Program Rule named 'Low Birth Weight Trigger' for the Child Programme. 4) The rule's condition must check if the birth weight (often labeled 'Weight (g)' or 'CP Birth Weight') is < 2500. 5) The rule's action must be an 'Assign value' action that sets the 'Neonatal Risk Status' data element to the text value 'High Risk'.
